title: Light-Delayed Goodbye
lyricSeed:
By the time you hear me I am gone
Racing through the dark to somewhere new
Goodbye arrives a hundred sunsets late
But I still mean it, I still mean you
Catch the shimmer of my dying wave
Love me in the echo, love the ghost I gave

chunks.text:
By the time you hear me I am gone
Racing through the dark to somewhere new
